transcript.clean_text: bad weather was once again forecast for stage six of the juror italia as the riders left central marque and headed right to the southern border with abruzzo starting just outside the caves in frasassi and finishing up above ascoli piccino the final climb would be 15 kilometers long and the hardest uphill finish we've had so far at this judo the 160 kilometer run started aggressively attacks from the off plenty of them too it would take quite a while for the break to form mate mohrich pulling things along initially six riders getting there and then it will be an odyssey for balkan molemer and jeffrey bouchard to try and join them join them they eventually did eight riders up the road with bouchard taking the maximum points on the first categorized climb of the day behind in the peliton they'd given a maximum gap of five and a half minutes but the ineos grenadiers pulling things on the descent the maya rosa losing the wheel alongside domenico pozovivo and many others and then in the crosswinds the ineos grenadiers would really put the hammer down petiole chicony and balder went away on the descent and they'd be chased by phillyport ghana was almost a team time trial at stages for the ineos grenadiers chicorny and company was soon caught just before the base of the final climb maharich's job was done a couple of k's into that climb qatar were left a bizarre worrying incident saw the bike exchange team car knock over peter said he he'd luckily get back on his bike but understandably be very angry 3.3 kilometers to go and maida would attack both cathaldo and malama the two veterans couldn't find any response to the young 24 year old and martinez started the hostilities from the peloton the mayarosa already 15 minutes down at this stage we'd be having a new leader but who would win the stage but now himself then attacked he took chicorny even a pool and vlasiv the latter unable to withstand the pace and only dan martin would get across midas time gap was coming down but inside the final kilometer he managed to hang on despite bernal applying the pressure and just months after being denied in the final meters at parinice mida eventually became a professional bike race winner at a grand tour nonetheless and just 24 hours after losing their leader bahrain victoria's bounce back bernal finished second martin third even a pool and chicane with him and then another gap to the next bunch of favourites small gaps all the way through in a shake-up of the gc maida winning the stage by 12 seconds from bernal martin even pool and chicone then caruso martinez soler kathy and vlasov at just under half a minute the maya rosa coming down a long way down the new maya rosa attila valtter who became the first ever hungarian to lead one of cycling's grand tours just 22 years of age and valtter ahead of nepal by just 11 seconds with bernal moving up into third at 16 seconds the hunt the race the fight for pink is definitely on the giro d'italia top 20 still separated by only two minutes and on stage seven the sprinters should get another opportunity the race hitting the coast on a couple of occasions before just one climb in kieti they then hit the coast again and ahead very much south the wind may be playing a factor though on the way to teremoli 181 kilometers stage seven of the jedi tally with a brand new leader in the shape of attila walter you
